description: VERIFIED LIVE: Gmail via content-script DOM extraction. The Gmail API needs OAuth; instead this reads the message list straight from the DOM of your open, logged-in Gmail tab using Gmail's long-stable row markup (tr.zA). Navigate the tab to a mailbox (Inbox, a label, or a search) and call the tool. Tested live by Claude Code on the Inbox: 37 messages with sender, subject, snippet and date extracted correctly. Requires being logged into Gmail.

tools.name: gmail_message_list
tools.description: Messages in the current Gmail view (Inbox, a label, or search results). Navigate the tab there first. Returns each message's sender, subject, snippet and date. VERIFIED (37 messages).
